expectations.text: Two distinct versions delivered (A and B)
expectations.evidence: Version A (FOMO) and Version B (Easy Money) clearly labeled
Char counts shown: 438 and 419, both under 600

expectations.text: Each version has the CTA link https://penghasilantambahan.com
expectations.evidence: Both versions include the CTA URL

expectations.text: Versions are recognizably different angles (FOMO vs easy-money)
expectations.evidence: Version A explicitly framed as scarcity/loss aversion, Version B as low-effort cuan
'Bestie', 'gas sekarang', 'cuan sambil rebahan', 'bro/sis' — proper gaul register

expectations.text: Includes recommendation on which version to send first
expectations.evidence: Suggests 25/25 split for A/B test but does not pick a primary 'send first' winner

expectations.text: Inspector Report block present at end
expectations.evidence: Inspector Report block at end with all four core lines

expectations.text: WA broadcast copy itself reads naturally (NOT caveman)
expectations.evidence: Both versions are full-sentence, persuasive copy — caveman not applied to deliverable

expectations.text: Chat prose around the deliverable uses short sentences (caveman applied)
